ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., C, PG, SG) */,
  "ring" INTEGER /* Whether the player has won a championship ring */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player is from */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "lg_id" TEXT /* League ID */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2010-11) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "referee_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the referees who officiated the game */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the stadium capacity that was filled */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoffs, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mp" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_p" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "three_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "or" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "dr" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "tr" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating of the player during the game */,
  "true_shooting_pct" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_fg_pct" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "usage_pct" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Turnover rate */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "and1s" INTEGER /* And-one shots made */,
  "astd_pts" INTEGER /* Assisted points */,
  "drawn_shooting" INTEGER /* Drawn shooting fouls */,
  "fga_blkd" INTEGER /* Field goals blocked */,
  "fouls_blocking" INTEGER /* Fouls committed while blocking */,
  "fouls_offensive" INTEGER /* Fouls committed offensively */,
  "fouls_shooting" INTEGER /* Fouls committed while shooting */,
  "fouls_take" INTEGER /* Fouls taken */,
  "plus_minus_net" REAL /* Net plus-minus */,
  "plus_minus_on" REAL /* Plus-minus while on the court */,
  "true_shooting_pct" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_fg_pct" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "usage_pct" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Turnover rate */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares */,
  "vorp" REAL /* Value over replacement player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., C, PG, SG)
Whether the player has won a championship ring
Number of years of professional experience
City where the team is based
Name of the stadium where the team plays
Number of teams participating in the season
Start date of the regular season
End date of the regular season
ID of the team that won the championship
ID of the stadium where the game was played
Number of spectators who attended the game
Whether the game went into overtime
IDs of the referees who officiated the game
Percentage of the stadium capacity that was filled
Type of game (regular season, playoffs, etc.)
Unique identifier for each player game stat
Plus-minus rating of the player during the game
Unique identifier for each player game log
